dimensions.label: 引拍 / 转肩
dimensions.evidence: Unit turn is visible before the forward swing.

dimensions.label: 屈膝储能
dimensions.evidence: Knee flexion is present but releases early.

dimensions.label: 击球空间
dimensions.evidence: Contact is slightly close to the body in two confirmed repetitions.

dimensions.label: 随挥减速
dimensions.evidence: The racket completes a balanced cross-body deceleration path.

dimensions.label: 恢复 / 平衡
dimensions.evidence: The clip shows balance after contact but not full court recovery.

dimensions.label: 重复稳定性
dimensions.evidence: Only three usable repetitions are available.
